owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

getAssetPrice(address).notice: Get the price of an asset in base currency

priceHistory(address,uint256).notice: Asset => Historical prices for TWAP (circular buffer)

setPriceFeed(address,address,address,uin.notice: Configure price feed for an asset

updatePrice(address).notice: Update price (can be called by keepers)

documentation.text: @notice Asset => Historical prices for TWAP (circular buffer)

@notice Update price (can be called by keepers)
 @param asset The asset to update

@title OracleRouter
 @notice Price oracle aggregator with fallback mechanisms
 @dev Supports Chainlink feeds, TWAPs, and manual price setting
 Security:
 - Multi-source price validation
 - Staleness checks
 - Deviation threshold alerts
 - Circuit breaker for extreme volatility
 MEV Protection:
 - TWAP for large positions
 - Delayed price updates option
